name: Amanda Lacaze
background: Amanda Lacaze was appointed as Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of Lynas on 25 June 2014. She has over 35 years of experience in senior operational roles including as CEO of Commander Communications, Executive Chairman of Orion Telecommunications and CEO of AOL|7. Amanda is a Non-Executive Director of the Minerals Council of Australia and a member of the Australian Government’s First Nations Clean Energy Strategy Advisory Group.

commpanies.name: Lynas Rare Earths Limited
commpanies.title_or_role: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer
